nodes.name: 📁 Google Drive PE Document Monitor
nodes.notes:
Monitors PE company folders for new financial documents.
Folders: /Private Companies/CompanyA/, /Private Companies/CompanyB/
Triggers on: PDF, Excel, Word, PowerPoint uploads

nodes.name: 📄 Extract From File (Multi-Format)
nodes.notes:
Extracts text content from PE documents.
Supports: PDF, Excel (.xlsx), Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx)
Preserves tables and formatting for better metric extraction

nodes.name: 🧮 Financial Metrics Extraction Engine
nodes.notes:
Extracts financial metrics using Phase 1 MetricExtractor.js patterns.
Accuracy: 89.6% validated
Metrics: Revenue, Valuation, EBITDA, Growth Rate, Customer Count, ARR
Includes confidence scoring and priority calculation

options.systemMessage: You are a precise financial analyst. Always respond with valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🤖 LLM Financial Validator (GPT-4)
nodes.notes:
Validates and enhances regex extraction using GPT-4.
Improves accuracy by 10-15% over regex-only extraction.
Adds context, period information, and catches missed metrics.
Temperature: 0.2 for consistent financial analysis

value.processing_notes: ={{ 'MVP: Regex+LLM extraction, Phase 1 patterns, automated processing' }}

nodes.name: 💾 State Database Logger (Google Sheets)
nodes.notes:
Logs metrics to time-series state database using Google Sheets.
Based on Phase 1 StateDatabase.js and DatabaseSchema.js
Auto-creates company-specific sheets
Implements append-only architecture for audit trail

nodes.name: 🚨 Priority Alert Router
nodes.notes:
Routes high-priority/high-confidence analyses for immediate alerts.
Triggers: Priority ≥75 AND Confidence ≥0.8
High Priority: Annual filings, >$100M revenue, >$1B valuation

nodes.name: 📱 Slack High Priority Alert
nodes.notes:
Sends immediate Slack alerts for high-value opportunities.
Channel: #pe-analysis
Triggers: High priority + high confidence documents
Includes: Metrics, confidence scores, next actions

nodes.name: 📝 Review Queue Logger
nodes.notes:
Logs lower priority items to manual review queue.
Tracks: All processed documents for analyst review
Fields: Priority, confidence, metrics count, review status

nodes.name: 📈 Delta Intelligence Calculator
nodes.notes:
Calculates metric changes and generates delta intelligence.
MVP: Simplified delta calculation with mock historical data
Future: Will integrate with actual historical database
Generates alerts for significant changes (>10% or >$1M)

nodes.name: ⚡ Delta Alert Router
nodes.notes:
Routes significant metric changes for immediate notification.
Triggers: >20% change OR >$5M absolute change
Sends critical alerts for major metric movements

nodes.name: 🚨 Critical Delta Alert
nodes.notes:
Sends critical alerts for significant metric changes.
Channel: #pe-critical-alerts
Triggers: Major percentage or absolute value changes
Includes: Change analysis, immediate action items

nodes.name: 📊 Monitoring & Analytics Hook
nodes.notes:
Sends processing metrics to monitoring system.
Tracks: Document processing stats, metric accuracy, performance
Endpoint: Configurable monitoring webhook for analytics

nodes.name: ❌ Error Handler & Recovery
nodes.notes:
Handles processing errors and low-confidence extractions.
Triggers: Processing errors OR confidence <50%
Routes to: Error logging, manual review queue, admin alerts

nodes.name: 📋 Error Logger & Tracking
nodes.notes:
Logs processing errors and low-confidence extractions.
Tracks: Error patterns, recovery actions, investigation status
Used for: System improvement and quality monitoring
